ValidationRule.description: Display error if Language field is blank and Inform Contact on Case closed checkbox is active.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordType.Name = 'Case External Belgium' ,NOT(CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName)), Language__c = Null, Inform_Contact_On_Case_Closed__c = True )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: “Warning – No email notification was sent to the contact as the Contact Language is unknown. Please uncheck the check box ‘inform contact on case close’ to Save this case without notification”
